categories.name: Cleaning Chemicals
categories.description: Professional-grade cleaning chemicals for commercial and domestic use. All-purpose degreasers, disinfectants, floor cleaners, and more.

products.name: Times Golden Hour Heavy Duty Alkaline Degreaser
products.short_description: Heavy-duty alkaline degreaser for industrial and commercial surfaces.
products.description: Times Golden Hour Heavy Duty Alkaline Degreaser is a powerful, professional-strength cleaner designed to cut through grease, oil, and heavy soiling on all hard surfaces. Ideal for commercial kitchens, factories, and industrial environments.

products.name: TIMES Lemon Time Disinfectant
products.short_description: Lemon-scented disinfectant for general surface sanitisation.
products.description: TIMES Lemon Time Disinfectant is a hospital-grade surface disinfectant with a fresh lemon fragrance. Kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on hard surfaces. Suitable for kitchens, bathrooms, and high-touch areas.

products.name: Industrial Bleach
products.short_description: Heavy-strength bleach for disinfection, whitening and sanitising.
products.description: Industrial-strength bleach for commercial and domestic use. Effective against bacteria, mould, and mildew on hard surfaces. Suitable for bathrooms, kitchens, and laundry applications.

products.name: Carpet Cleaner
products.short_description: Deep-action carpet cleaning solution for stains and odours.
products.description: Professional carpet cleaning concentrate. Penetrates deep into carpet fibres to lift and remove stubborn stains, dirt, and odours. Safe for use in carpet cleaning machines and spot-treatment.

products.name: Floor Cleaner
products.short_description: Professional floor cleaning solution for all hard floor types.
products.description: Multi-surface floor cleaner suitable for tiles, vinyl, timber, and polished concrete. Leaves floors streak-free with a fresh scent. Dilutable concentrate for economical use.

products.name: Glass Cleaning Products
products.short_description: Streak-free glass and window cleaning solution.
products.description: Professional glass and window cleaning solution. Delivers a crystal-clear, streak-free finish on glass, mirrors, and windows. Fast-drying formula suitable for commercial and domestic use.

products.name: Household Disinfectant
products.short_description: Kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on household surfaces.
products.description: Ready-to-use household disinfectant for kitchens, bathrooms, and high-touch areas. Effective against a broad spectrum of bacteria and viruses. Safe for use around family and pets when dry.

products.name: Oven & Grill Cleaner
products.short_description: Heavy-duty degreaser for ovens, grills and barbeques.
products.description: Industrial-strength oven and grill cleaner. Dissolves baked-on grease, carbon deposits, and food residue quickly. Suitable for commercial kitchen ovens, grills, fryers, and BBQs.

categories.name: Paper Products
categories.description: High-quality Caprice paper products for commercial and hospitality use — toilet paper, hand towels, facial tissues, and napkins.

products.name: Caprice Duro Toilet Paper Roll
products.short_description: Individually wrapped 2ply toilet paper, 48 rolls per carton.
products.description: Caprice Duro Toilet Paper Rolls are individually wrapped for hygiene in busy washrooms. Available in 2ply 400 sheets (48 rolls/carton) and 3ply 225 sheets (48 rolls/carton). Suitable for hotels, offices, schools, and commercial facilities.

products.name: Caprice Duro Interleaved Hand Towel
products.short_description: 24 x 23cm interleaved hand towels — multiple grades available.
products.description: Caprice Duro Interleaved Hand Towels are designed for high-traffic washrooms. Available in Standard, Economy, and 2 Ply options. Dimensions: 24cm x 23cm. Ideal for offices, schools, hospitals, and hospitality environments.

products.name: Caprice Jumbo Toilet Paper Roll 300m
products.short_description: 2ply jumbo roll 300 metres, 8 rolls per carton.
products.description: Caprice Jumbo Toilet Paper Roll 2ply, 300 metres per roll. Carton quantity of 8 rolls. Designed for high-traffic commercial washrooms. Requires a jumbo toilet roll dispenser.

products.name: Caprice Ultrasoft Facial Tissues 2 Ply
products.short_description: 2ply facial tissues, 200 sheets per box, 24 boxes per carton.
products.description: Caprice Ultrasoft Facial Tissues are soft, strong and dermatologically tested. 2 Ply, 200 sheets per box. Carton contains 24 boxes. Ideal for offices, hotels, medical centres, and hospitality.

products.name: Caprice Roll Towel 80m
products.short_description: Continuous roll towel, 80m per roll, 16 rolls per carton.
products.description: Caprice Roll Towels 80m. Each carton contains 16 rolls. Designed for use with roll towel dispensers in commercial washrooms, kitchens, and industrial facilities.

products.name: Caprice Quilted Dinner Napkins — White GT Fold
products.short_description: Premium white quilted dinner napkins in GT fold.
products.description: Caprice Quilted Dinner White GT Fold Napkins. Elegant, premium-quality napkins for restaurants, cafes, catering events, and hospitality. White colour with quilted finish for a premium presentation.

categories.name: Garbage Bin Liners
categories.description: Heavy-duty LDPE black bin liners in multiple sizes — from small kitchen bins to large 240L commercial bins.

products.name: 36L Large Kitchen Tidy Bag Roll
products.short_description: Black 36L kitchen bin liner roll, 8 micron thickness.
products.description: 36L Large Kitchen Tidy Bag Roll in black. 8um thickness. Sold in rolls for convenient dispensing. Ideal for kitchen bins, office bins, and small waste containers.

products.name: 73L Medium Duty Black LDPE Bin Liners
products.short_description: Medium-duty 73L black bin liners, 250 liners per carton.
products.description: Tailored Packaging Medium Duty Black LDPE 73L Bin Liners. 250 liners per carton. Suitable for office waste bins, retail, and light commercial use.

products.name: 120L Heavy Duty Black LDPE Bin Liners
products.short_description: Heavy-duty 120L black bin liners, 250 liners per carton.
products.description: Tailored Packaging Heavy Duty Black LDPE 120L Bin Liners. 250 liners per carton. Designed for large commercial and industrial waste bins. Extra-thick LDPE for heavy loads and sharp waste.

products.name: 240L Heavy Duty Black LDPE Bin Liners
products.short_description: Heavy-duty 240L black bin liners for large industrial bins.
products.description: Tailored Packaging Heavy Duty Black LDPE 240L Bin Liners. 250 liners per carton. Ideal for large outdoor and industrial wheelie bins. Extremely durable LDPE construction handles heavy and bulky waste.

categories.name: Disposable Gloves
categories.description: Nitrile and poly disposable gloves for cleaning, food handling, and medical use — powder-free options available.

products.name: Ultra Touch Nitrile Blue Powder Free Gloves
products.short_description: Blue nitrile powder-free gloves — S, M, L, XL available.
products.description: Ultra Touch Nitrile Blue Powder Free Gloves. Latex-free and powder-free for comfort and safety. Textured fingertips for enhanced grip. Suitable for cleaning, medical, food preparation, and general use. Available in sizes S, M, L, XL.

products.name: Clear Poly Gloves — Large
products.short_description: Clear disposable poly gloves for food handling — Large size.
products.description: Clear disposable polyethylene gloves, Large size. Lightweight and economical. Ideal for food preparation, light cleaning, and general handling tasks where full protection is not required.

products.name: Clear Poly Gloves — Medium
products.short_description: Clear disposable poly gloves for food handling — Medium size.
products.description: Clear disposable polyethylene gloves, Medium size. Lightweight and economical. Ideal for food preparation, light cleaning, and general handling tasks.

categories.name: Dusters
categories.description: Professional lambswool and microfibre dusters for delicate and hard-to-reach surfaces.

products.name: Oates Wool Duster — 60cm
products.short_description: Handcrafted genuine lambswool duster, 60cm. Assorted colours.
products.description: Oates Wool Duster 60cm. Handcrafted genuine lambswool creates a dense duster head that maximises surface contact. Creates a static charge to attract fine dust and lint. Premium wool fibres are flexible and gentle on delicate surfaces. Comes in assorted colours.

categories.name: Mop Bucket & Mop Heads
categories.description: Commercial-grade mop buckets with wringers and professional contractor mop heads.

products.name: Mop Bucket 16L Commercial Heavy Duty Wringer
products.short_description: 16L commercial heavy-duty mop bucket with wringer.
products.description: 16L Commercial Cleaning Heavy Duty Wringer Mop Bucket. Durable construction for intensive daily use. Integrated wringer for efficient water extraction. Suitable for commercial and industrial floor cleaning operations.

products.name: Sabco Professional Contractor Mop Head
products.short_description: Heavy-duty contractor mop head for commercial floor cleaning.
products.description: Sabco Professional Contractor Mop Head. Built for high-frequency commercial use. Durable cotton and synthetic blend mop head delivers excellent water absorption and floor coverage. Compatible with standard mop handles.

categories.name: Brooms & Handles
categories.description: Professional brooms, cobweb brooms, and grout brushes from Oates and Sabco for indoor and outdoor use.

products.name: Oates Soft Grip Grout Brush
products.short_description: Ergonomic soft-grip grout brush for tiles and grout lines.
products.description: Oates Soft Grip Grout Brush features a comfortable soft-grip handle and stiff nylon bristles for scrubbing grout lines, tiles, and corners. Ideal for bathrooms, kitchens, and outdoor paving.

products.name: Sabco Premium Outdoor Broom
products.short_description: Heavy-duty outdoor broom for driveways, paths, and courtyards.
products.description: Sabco Premium Outdoor Broom with durable stiff bristles for sweeping outdoor surfaces including concrete, brick, asphalt, and pavers. Ergonomic handle for comfortable extended use.

products.name: Oates Domed Cobweb Broom
products.short_description: Domed head cobweb broom for ceilings and high corners.
products.description: Oates Domed Cobweb Broom features a domed head that effectively captures and removes cobwebs from ceilings, cornices, and high corners. Lightweight with a long handle for easy reach.

products.name: Oates Round Flexible Cobweb Broom
products.short_description: Flexible round cobweb broom for hard-to-reach corners.
products.description: Oates Round Cobweb Broom with a flexible round head that bends to follow contours of walls, ceilings, and corners. Ideal for removing cobwebs in tight and awkward spaces.

categories.name: Spray Bottles
categories.description: Professional-grade spray bottles and trigger heads for dispensing cleaning chemicals efficiently.

products.name: NAB Clean 500ml Plastic Spray Bottle — Straight
products.short_description: 500ml straight plastic spray bottle for chemical dispensing.
products.description: NAB Clean 500ml Straight Plastic Spray Bottle. Durable, chemical-resistant bottle suitable for all cleaning solutions. Designed to work with the NAB Clean trigger head. Graduated measurements for accurate dilution.

products.name: NAB Clean Spray Trigger
products.short_description: Replacement spray trigger for NAB Clean spray bottles.
products.description: NAB Clean Replacement Spray Trigger. Compatible with NAB Clean spray bottles. Adjustable nozzle for stream, mist, or off settings. Chemical-resistant materials for long-lasting performance.

categories.name: Cleaning Wipes & Cloths
categories.description: Professional microfibre cloths and heavy-duty wiper rolls for streak-free cleaning of all surfaces.

products.name: Microfibre Cloths 40cm x 40cm — Colour Coded
products.short_description: Colour-coded microfibre cloths for multi-zone cleaning, 40x40cm.
products.description: Professional-grade microfibre cloths, 40cm x 40cm. Available in Blue, Yellow, Green, and Red for colour-coded cleaning zones. Traps and lifts dust, grease, and grime without chemicals. Machine washable and reusable.

products.name: Microfibre Cloths for Glass
products.short_description: Lint-free microfibre cloths for streak-free glass and mirror cleaning.
products.description: Specialist microfibre cloths designed specifically for glass, windows, and mirrors. Ultra-fine fibres deliver a lint-free, streak-free finish. Can be used dry or with minimal water or glass cleaner.

products.name: Duro Heavy Duty Wiper Roll 50cm x 30cm
products.short_description: Industrial-strength perforated wiper roll, 50cm x 30cm.
products.description: Duro Heavy Duty Wiper Roll 50cm x 30cm. Strong, absorbent, and perforated for easy tearing. Ideal for workshop spills, industrial wiping, and heavy-duty surface cleaning where cloths are not practical.

categories.name: Window Cleaning Accessories
categories.description: Professional window cleaning tools — squeegees, T-bars, extension poles, and window buckets.

products.name: 12.5L Window Cleaning Bucket — Blue & White
products.short_description: Wide, flat 12.5L window bucket for T-bars and squeegees.
products.description: 12.5L Window Cleaning Bucket in Blue & White. Wide, flat design accommodates large T-bar washers and squeegees. Durable plastic construction for professional outdoor and commercial window cleaning.

products.name: Glidex T-Bar & Washer
products.short_description: Professional T-bar applicator and washer for window cleaning.
products.description: Glidex T-Bar & Washer for professional window cleaning. The washer sleeve glides over glass to pre-wet and loosen dirt. Compatible with standard window extension poles. Sold as a set.

products.name: Window Extension Pole — 1.2m / 2.4m / 3.6m
products.short_description: Telescopic extension pole for window cleaning at height.
products.description: Telescopic Window Extension Pole available in 1.2m, 2.4m, and 3.6m lengths. Lightweight aluminium construction with locking collar. Compatible with T-bars, squeegees, and other window cleaning accessories.

products.name: Sabco Pro Stainless Steel Power Dry Squeegee
products.short_description: Stainless steel professional window squeegee for streak-free results.
products.description: Sabco Pro Stainless Steel Power Dry Squeegee. Professional-grade stainless steel channel with high-quality rubber blade for streak-free window and glass cleaning. Fits standard window cleaning poles.

meta.notes: Image URLs use Unsplash placeholder images. Replace with actual product images from cleanersgallery.com.au CDN or supplier image assets before going to production.
